title: ctenitis balabacensis
intro: Ctenitis balabacensis, also known as the Balabac ctenitis fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis balabacensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat various infections, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Ctenitis balabacensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
